arts.ttl: Arsenal and Bayern Munich open talks for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Arsenal and Bayern Munich have opened talks with the entourage of Jonathan David over a potential summer free transfer. If true, it will cost €34m over the first year alone for Arsenal or Bayern Munich to sign David this summer.
